examples.title: Safe Element Removal Using Iterator
examples.description: Correct way to remove elements matching condition during iteration
examples.explanation: Creates iterator, checks hasNext() before each next(), uses iterator's remove() method instead of collection's remove(). This prevents ConcurrentModificationException.

examples.title: ListIterator Bidirectional Traversal
examples.description: Demonstrates forward and backward navigation with ListIterator
examples.explanation: ListIterator from list.listIterator() starts at position 0. nextIndex() returns upcoming element index, previousIndex() returns index of element to the left. add() inserts before cursor.

examples.title: Iterator with forEachRemaining (Java 8+)
examples.description: Modern iterator usage with lambda expressions
examples.explanation: forEachRemaining() is a default method in Iterator (since Java 8) that performs the given action for each remaining element. More efficient than manual loop as it can use internal array. forEach() in Collection also uses iterator but wraps exceptions.
